name: @glapsfun/sddx
description: Loop-based Spec-Driven Development: dense specs with mandatory oracles, hook-enforced TDD, parallel worktrees, hash-chained receipts.
author: glapsfun

scripts.check: bun run lint && bun run typecheck && bun test && bun run build
scripts.prepublishOnly: node -e "if (!process.env.CI) { console.error('sddx: refusing an accidental local npm publish. This only guards against running it by mistake, not who has publish rights on the glapsfun org — set CI=true deliberately to override (e.g. the one-time bootstrap publish): CI=true npm publish'); process.exit(1); }"
